visual_description: The audio opens with a tense and suspenseful electronic score, creating a feeling of high-stakes drama and imminent danger. A close-up shot focuses on a person's hand holding a black smartphone. The phone's screen is illuminated, displaying a message in Chinese characters. The text includes phrases like "有內鬼終止交易" and "確認". In the dimly lit background, a man with graying hair, wearing a light-colored suit jacket, is visible but out of focus. The overall lighting is dark and has a greenish tint. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the upper left corner. The camera pulls back slightly to a medium shot of the man in the suit jacket. He has a concerned and serious expression as he looks down, seemingly at the phone he was just holding. Other people are seated around him in the dark, out-of-focus background. The greenish, moody lighting continues to dominate the scene. The man in the suit jacket brings the phone to his ear, his expression becoming more intense and focused. The camera remains steady, keeping him as the central figure.
